target.label: whitelist source-of-truth + pnpm devbox:whitelist atomic-reload CLI

rationale: User-facing-CLI class story — fourth Epic 2 + first of its class (operator-editable bash CLI with domain-regex validation + mutation-lock + atomic-replace + diff summary + subcommand dispatcher outside the Vitest/Playwright idiom); extends the Story 2.3 iter-159 thirteenth cumulative WAIVED precedent (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 = FOURTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED; under the ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED co-application rule this pairs with the FOURTEENTH iter-173 ATDD-skip: 10 Epic-1 pairings + 2.1 + 2.2 + 2.3 + 2.4 = 15th pairing overall). Story v1.1 iter-173 Change Log row (ATDD-skip) + v1.3 iter-174 dev-story landing explicitly defer per-AC automated coverage to Story 2.4-test-runner-landing (Epic 13 scope) + Task 10.1–10.8 + Subtask 9.2 operator-workstation live smokes (backend-B iteration-env constraint — `/run` not writable, no dnsmasq, no nft, no running container; bind-mount-denial precedent from Story 2.1 iter-127 applies) via hybrid ground-(a)-(b)-(c)-(d) variant-(ii)+(iii) ATDD-skip clause. (a) substrate-verification-covers-ACs at CLI-exit-code level — (AC 1) packages/devbox/whitelist.default.txt header rewritten iter-174 (content unchanged) documenting three-stage composition (baseline → fragments → per-fork override); whitelist.sh ~360 LOC compose_whitelist_into() SC-4 three-stage composer; start-egress.sh 5-line append inside compose_whitelist() after fragments loop + WHITELIST_LOCAL constant + banner refresh (SC-14 byte-identity); SC-14 dual-composer parity smoke PASSED byte-identical in iteration env iter-174; .gitignore:48 with inline comment (SC-3, no `.example` bang per Story 2.2 iter-151 AR-2); AGENTS.md + README.md H3 subsections; cmd_list source-attribution smoke (fixture); (AC 2) whitelist.sh cmd_sync validates → composes → mv-atomic → invokes reload-egress.sh (Story 2.3 primitive UNTOUCHED per SC-19) + exit-code passthrough (SC-11); package.json `"devbox:whitelist"` scripts entry (SC-12); dispatcher exit-2 contract smoke (no-args / unknown / wrong-arity); SC-17 first-downstream-caller validates encapsulated-bootstrap-detour; (AC 3) validate_sources multi-error collection + validate_domain fast-fail; strict LDH regex + 253-char bound per SC-5 (known limits: RFC 3696 all-numeric TLD + trailing-dot FQDN deferred to post-1.0 — benign fail-closed failure modes; injection-prevention property preserved); fail-closed discipline verified at code-path level — validation failure → exit 2 WITHOUT invoking reload-egress.sh; iteration-env multi-error collection smoke (4 stderr lines with DEVBOX_DIR-relative paths + line numbers) + single-arg regex rejection smokes (underscore / leading-hyphen / trailing-dot); (AC 4) mutation-lock fd 201 for add/remove serialisation per SC-8 (fd 200 is reload-egress.sh's) released BEFORE sync to avoid nested-lock-deadlock; 10s timeout → exit 4; atomic-mutation discipline per SC-9 (`mv` rename(2); tempfile + trap-EXIT; iter-174 Completion Note: SC-9 binding contract overrides Subtask 4.5 `cp -f + rm` wording — `mv` is atomic, cp+rm is not); reload-egress.sh flock -x 200 `/run/keel-egress.lock` (Story 2.3 SC-5 untouched) serialises concurrent sync; kernel-atomic nft -f guarantee means no partial policy state; (AC 5) whitelist.default.txt + whitelist/*.txt tracked in git (Story 2.3) subject to prek gates at commit time; whitelist.local.txt gitignored per .gitignore:48; substrate-source protection in cmd_remove (Subtask 5.5) with comment-strip + blank-strip composition semantics emits FR44 AMEND pointer + exit 2; git check-ignore -v smoke verified the rule fires; SC-7 diff summary (+/- grouped, sorted, count-line) complements git-diff at PR time. All iteration-env smokes PASSED iter-174. Sync-gate (node packages/keel-invariants/dist/check.js) exit 0 green at iter-174 — 20 manifest entries valid (NO new entry per SC-15 consumer-only; INV-devbox-egress-contract contentHash unchanged). bash -n syntax OK for whitelist.sh + start-egress.sh + reload-egress.sh. (b) no test runner at Story 2.4 time — Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest/jest/playwright/cypress configs returns zero matches at iter-175; stack detection returns none (package.json has no react/vue/angular/next/playwright/cypress/vitest/jest dependencies — Epic 13 delivers framework landing per prior thirteen precedents). (c) HYBRID variant-(ii)+(iii) — variant (ii) downstream-test-runner-landing-covers-per-AC-coverage: Story 2.4-test-runner-landing (Epic 13 scope) + operator-workstation live smokes (Task 10.1–10.8 + 9.2) will unlock per-AC runtime probes (sync-on-empty / add-new / remove / list-in-container / validation-failure-nft-unchanged / substrate-protection / concurrent-sync / file-not-readable / pnpm script listing); Story 2.5 hardening exercises whitelist.sh as `dev` user under cap_drop:[ALL] + tmpfs; Story 2.6 host-side `pnpm devbox:whitelist` wrapper forwards via docker exec; Story 2.13 healthcheck orthogonal; Epic 4 FR37 security-evidence consumer unchanged; variant (iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution — Story 2.4 § Dev-agent guardrails (13 MUST-follow rules: fail-closed-everywhere + propagate-reload-egress-exit-codes + no-duplicate-reload-logic + composition-byte-identity + atomic-mutation + mutation-lock-discipline + no-gitignore-bang-for-.example + no-INV-manifest-edits + scope-isolation + kebab-case-sh-0755 + backend-B-aware + substrate-source-protection + no-.envrc-edits) + 19 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-19) + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial envelope (Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out against cumulative Story 2.4 substrate diff: ~360 LOC across 1 new file + 7 modified files) substitute for red-phase scaffolds. (d) upstream-provenance-precedent — Story 2.1 iter-98 established ground-(d) for infrastructure stories absorbing upstream cc-devbox content: upstream cc-devbox has no test suite, absorbing preserves that posture faithfully; Story 2.4 inherits this ground-(d) via its role as the FIX for upstream cc-devbox's three documented bugs (divergent-whitelist-tooling + fail-open-resolv.conf + IPv6-default-deny-gap) by providing ONE canonical operator-editable CLI entry point (SC-8 single-mechanism collapse) — replaces upstream's divergent `manage-whitelist.sh` + separate `whitelist` script with different state + different reload + intermittent unexpected blocks. The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 2.4 substrate stage. FOURTEENTH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT (Stories 1.7 → 1.16 = 10; Story 2.1 = 11; Story 2.2 = 12; Story 2.3 = 13; Story 2.4 = 14) — first user-facing-CLI class precedent-holder (Story 2.1 was infrastructure-smoke; Story 2.2 was hybrid infrastructure-smoke + configuration-surface; Story 2.3 was infrastructure-security with daemon + kernel-rule + atomic-reload + log-tailer outside the Vitest/Playwright idiom; Story 2.4 adds a new class: operator-editable bash CLI with subcommand dispatcher + regex validation + mutation-lock + atomic-replace + diff summary outside the Vitest/Playwright idiom). Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Stories 2.1 + 2.2 + 2.3 (~95% reasoning-cost savings per iter-126 + iter-149 + iter-159 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.4's 5-AC user-facing-CLI class with whitelist.sh CLI + SC-14 dual-composer parity smoke + domain-regex validation + fd-201 mutation-lock evidence replacing dnsmasq/nftables/JSONL-emitter substrate evidence). Unlike Story 2.3's operator-workstation-deferred substrate (ZERO in-iteration-executable runtime assertions), Story 2.4 has MORE in-iteration-executable evidence: SC-14 dual-composer parity smoke PASSED byte-identical in iteration env + dispatcher exit-2 contract smoke + domain-regex rejection smokes + validate_sources multi-error collection smoke + `git check-ignore -v` gitignore rule-fires smoke + `cmd_list` source-attribution smoke against fixture. Only live-container integration smokes (Task 10.1–10.8 full reload chain + Subtask 9.2 pnpm script listing) defer to operator workstation per backend-B carve-out. Story 2.4 advances Story State `in-dev → traced` (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: `/bmad-create-story (args: "review")` post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (`traced → sm-verified` or `sm-fixes-pending`).
